title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
